"Technical Evaluation Committee"
The Technical Evaluation Committee shall consist of:
1. Landslide measures under Maharashtra Responsible Development Programme (MRDP).
Examining technical reports, drawings, assessments, and project report providers.
2. As required to ensure technical quality and scientific integrity.
Suggestions, recommendations.

to give advice.
